Call ID: EXT-018
Type: external
Date: 2026-03-20
Topic: Churn Risk & Escalation
Participants: Hannah (account manager); Carlos (customer)
------------------------------------------------------------
AM (Hannah): Hi Carlos, thanks for making time today. How are things going on your side?
Customer (Carlos): The outages last quarter really shook our confidence.
AM (Hannah): Let me get you a firm commitment on the compliance roadmap.
Customer (Carlos): Numbers matter to us — show me the impact.
AM (Hannah): I'll escalate the reliability concerns to our VP directly.
Customer (Carlos): Let's reconvene in two weeks — the clock is ticking for us.
AM (Hannah): Thank you — I'll send a recap with clear next steps and owners by end of day.
